import logging

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)


class UserNotFoundError(Exception):
    pass


class UserTimeoutError(Exception):
    pass


class DuplicateUserError(Exception):
    pass


def fetch_user(user_id: str) -> dict:
    try:
        return db.query(f"SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = '{user_id}'")
    except UserNotFoundError:
        return {"id": user_id, "status": "not_found"}
    except UserTimeoutError:
        return {"id": user_id, "status": "timeout"}
    except DuplicateUserError:
        raise ValueError("User already exists")


class InsufficientFundsError(Exception):
    pass


class CardExpiredError(Exception):
    pass


class LimitExceededError(Exception):
    pass


def process_payment(amount: float) -> dict:
    try:
        return gateway.charge(amount)
    except InsufficientFundsError:
        return {"status": "declined", "reason": "funds"}
    except CardExpiredError:
        return {"status": "declined", "reason": "card_expired"}
    except LimitExceededError:
        return {"status": "declined", "reason": "limit"}


class ServiceUnavailableError(Exception):
    pass


class ConnectionTimedOutError(Exception):
    pass


def connect_service(url: str):
    try:
        return connect(url)
    except ServiceUnavailableError:
        logger.warning("Service unavailable")
    except ConnectionTimedOutError:
        logger.warning("Connection timed out")
